policy: No target-project severe vulnerability can be confirmed without target-specific dynamic evidence, negative controls, evidence manifest schema validation and report mapping. Fixture proof only promotes the engine, not target findings.

capabilities.scope: real AST for Python via ast and JS/TS/JSX/TSX via TypeScript Compiler API; other languages remain needs_review unless their bridges run successfully on target
engine verified on local non-destructive fixture; target findings remain needs_review until run against authorized target
matrix engine verifies admin/user/viewer and tenant controls on fixture

capabilities.reason: asset and endpoint extraction is candidate evidence, not backend reachability proof
detectors generate candidate risk until source-sink-dataflow-auth/tenant evidence and dynamic replay exist for target
confirmed report requires request/response, HAR/screenshot/log/code path and negative controls on target
